recipes.name: mitarbeiter-in-gruppe-aufnehmen
recipes.goal: Add an existing employee/client to a group for a given period.

steps.prompt: Ask the user which group the employee should be added to (the group name).
steps.description: the name of the group the employee should be added to

steps.note: Find the target group. The search term is supplied. The recipe captures the matching group automatically when exactly one group matches.

steps.prompt: Ask the user for the name of the employee (client) to add to the group.
steps.description: the full name (first and last name) of the employee to add

steps.note: Find the employee. The search term is supplied. The recipe captures the matching employee automatically when exactly one matches.

steps.prompt: Ask the user from which date the group membership should be valid (valid-until is optional).
steps.description: the start date from which the group membership is valid

steps.note: Add the employee to the group now. clientId and groupId are supplied — do not ask for them. Use the start date the user gave (see the known values below) as validFrom, formatted as a date (yyyy-MM-dd). This skill rejects duplicates, so it safely refuses if the employee is already in the group.
